attributes.Description: Waiting for assessment of the complaint in the store

attributes.LogText: Complaint craeted
The store or supplier has decided about handling, se other states for next step
Complaint product in store, see other states to see what to do with it
Send the complaint product to the repairer

attributes.Message: Decision to repair the complaint product has been taken.

attributes.LogText: Decision has been taken to repair the broken product

attributes.Message: The store doesn't accept the complaint (see assessment for details).

attributes.LogText: The store or supplier has decided about handling, se other states for next step
Decision has been taken to deny the complaint.
The store or supplier has decided about handling, se other states for next step
Complaint product in store, see other states to see what to do with it
Customer will be reimbursed with cash or credit
The supplier will reimburse with credit
Complaint craeted
Decision has been taken to reimburse the customer
The store or supplier has decided about handling, se other states for next step
Send the complaint product to the repairer

attributes.Message: Decision to repair the complaint product has been taken.

attributes.LogText: Decision has been taken to repair the broken product
Exchange product from the store will be used
Complaint craeted

attributes.Message: Decision to replace the complaint product has been taken.

attributes.LogText: The store or supplier has decided about handling, se other states for next step
Decision has been taken to exchange the broken product to a new one from the store

attributes.Message: Sorry about the delay, we've contacted the supplier

attributes.LogText: The store or supplier has decided about handling, se other states for next step
Send the complaint product to the repairer

attributes.Message: Decision to repair the complaint product has been taken.
